tasks.title: Tutorial CSS styles
tasks.description: Add all CSS for the tutorial overlay: semi-transparent backdrop, speech bubble with step content, animated arrows, pulse highlights on target elements, step indicator dots, skip/next buttons, responsive mobile styles. The overlay should NOT fully block the UI — use pointer-events:none on the backdrop with pointer-events:auto on interactive elements.

tasks.title: Tutorial HTML structure
tasks.description: Add tutorial overlay div with step content containers, navigation buttons (Skip, Next, Done), step indicator dots. Add a ❓ help button in the controls bar to re-trigger the tutorial.

tasks.title: Tutorial JavaScript system
tasks.description: Implement: TUTORIAL_KEY localStorage constant, tutorial state (active, currentStep), showTutorial() to display overlay, renderTutorialStep(n) to show each of the 3 steps with appropriate positioning/highlighting, nextTutorialStep() to advance, skipTutorial()/completeTutorial() to dismiss and save to localStorage, triggerHelp() to re-open. Steps: (1) highlight palette + animated arrow toward grid + 'Drag a track piece!', (2) highlight a grid cell area + rotation arrow animation + 'Click to rotate!', (3) highlight play button with pulse + 'Press ▶ to go!'. Each step positions a spotlight/highlight ring around the target element.

tasks.title: Init integration
tasks.description: In init(), after all restoration: check localStorage for TUTORIAL_KEY. If not found (first visit), call showTutorial(). The tutorial should show AFTER the initial toast, not override it.

acceptance_criteria: AC1: Tutorial shows automatically on first visit (no TUTORIAL_KEY in localStorage)
AC2: Tutorial has 3 clear, animated steps with visual highlights on target elements
AC3: Step 1 highlights palette area with arrow animation pointing to grid
AC4: Step 2 shows rotation concept with arrow animation on grid area
AC5: Step 3 highlights play button with pulse animation
AC6: Skip button visible on every step, dismisses tutorial immediately
AC7: Next button advances steps; final step shows Done button
AC8: Tutorial never shows again after completion or skip (localStorage persisted)
AC9: ❓ help button in controls bar re-triggers tutorial on click
AC10: Tutorial completion saved to localStorage as TUTORIAL_KEY
AC11: Works on both desktop and mobile layouts
AC12: Semi-transparent overlay does not fully block underlying UI visually
AC13: Step indicator dots show current position (1/3, 2/3, 3/3)
AC14: Keyboard shortcut H opens help/tutorial (added to shortcuts modal)
testing_focus: Verify first-visit detection works (clear localStorage, reload)
Verify tutorial doesn't show on subsequent visits
Verify ❓ button re-triggers tutorial after completion
Verify all 3 steps display correctly with animations
Verify Skip works at every step
Verify no JS errors during tutorial flow
Verify tutorial doesn't interfere with existing features
